name: /risk-classify: output classification field is one of {prohibited, high, limited, minimal}
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" && grep -E "^classification: (prohibited|high|limited|minimal)$" compliance/risk-classification.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
